历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 13300 → 17815 → 17199 → 22012 → 20503, showing a fluctuating and backward trend overall. In 2024, it significantly dropped to 22012, then rebounded to 20503 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 7200 positions over the past 5 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 20503. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 84 in 2021, 85 in 2022, 83 in 2023, 99 in 2024, and 99 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 99, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction, so the competition base remains the same.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it is approximately 84th, with slight fluctuations in recent years (75th in 2023 to 84th in 2026), maintaining an upper-middle level. Its reputation has been stable recently, with no significant positive or negative public opinion incidents. Its popularity on Douyin is average, not in the top 100 overall. There are no records of admission cut-off gaps or anomalies, so the application psychology is stable. Electrical Engineering is rated A (top in the country), and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics is rated A-, both core disciplines in the power industry, closely aligned with the university's characteristics, strongly attracting Physics Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Electrical, Computer, and Automation continue to have high social popularity. The number of provincial Physics Category candidates in 2026 is approximately 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% from 320,192 in 2025, intensifying competition. The university is located in Baoding, Hebei Province, not a first-tier city, but as the 'Whampoa Military Academy' of the power industry, it has strong cross-provincial appeal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating and backward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the increase of about 8.4% in provincial Physics Category candidates leading to intensified competition, and the continuous attraction of high-scoring candidates by the top electrical engineering discipline, the minimum ranking for 2026 is expected to shift slightly backward from the 2025 ranking of 20503. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 20703, with a range of 20203 to 21203.
